belier.intro: Monday opens under a waxing Moon entering Cancer, dear Aries, touching your zone of roots and home. Mars, your ruler, asks you to slow the pace a little so you can anchor what you sowed over the weekend. The Sun in Taurus, in its final degrees, reminds you of the value of a stable frame before the week's bustle picks up.
belier.love: The atmosphere favors tenderness over conquest. If you are partnered, a simple dinner at home can feel better than an ambitious outing, and you have the chance to voice an emotional need without dressing it as a complaint. If you are single, a soft memory rising up invites you to clarify what you are truly looking for.
belier.work: You can set a clear intention for the week rather than scattering yourself from the morning on. A logistics question, a schedule to review or a family file can find a resolution if you accept to talk calmly. Avoid pushing a topic by force today, gentleness travels further.
belier.energy: Your body asks for a gradual start, a careful breakfast and a few stretches matter more than a morning sprint. Protect your belly from the cold and choose warm meals.
belier.intuition: The Cancer Moon opens your felt sense, listen to what your inner ground murmurs about a family bond. An emotion that returns without drama is a precious compass.
belier.mantra: I root myself to move forward better
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Sun is finishing its run in your sign, dear Taurus, and the waxing Moon slides into Cancer through your zone of exchanges and daily life. Venus, your ruler, stays in Gemini and keeps you focused on the tangible value of what you are building. You may feel a particular softness in the simple gestures of the morning.
taureau.love: Tender words carry the weight of small gifts today. If you are partnered, a voice message or a short letter can revive a closeness that busy days had muted. If you are single, an engaging conversation with someone close can reveal an attraction you had not noticed.
taureau.work: You have the chance to sort, organize and plan without pressure, and each small step you take counts double. A call to a professional neighbor, a colleague or a sibling can unblock a practical question. Keep your expectations reasonable, you have nothing to prove through rushing.
taureau.energy: Your voice and throat deserve attention, a honey lemon tea and a light scarf may be enough. Walk gently in fresh air to wake up your circulation.
taureau.intuition: Your thoughts organize better when you write by hand rather than on screen. A sentence placed on paper this morning can illuminate the whole month ahead.
taureau.mantra: My small gestures build something large
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: Venus is still visiting you, dear Gemini, and the waxing Moon enters Cancer through your zone of resources and value. Mercury, your ruler, invites you to turn an idea into a concrete gesture, especially around material questions. The Sun in Taurus, in its final degrees, pushes you to honor what you already have before wanting more.
gemeaux.love: Your magnetism stays active but wraps itself in a warmer, more intimate tone today. If you are partnered, speaking about money or material organization without tension can strengthen trust. If you are single, an attention received spontaneously may move you more than expected, welcome it without playing it down.
gemeaux.work: You have the chance to revisit a rate, a budget or an expense line with lucidity. A talk with a client or partner around numbers can clarify lingering misunderstandings. Put simple things on paper, numerical clarity speaks louder than long arguments today.
gemeaux.energy: Your breath benefits from slowing down, a few minutes of belly breathing calm the mind effectively. Choose a light dinner to sleep deeply.
gemeaux.intuition: An intuition about a paid project may pop up without warning, write it down without judging. What speaks to body and wallet at the same time deserves to be followed.
gemeaux.mantra: What I am worth is not up for debate
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon, your ruler, enters your sign on Monday, dear Cancer, and makes you especially present to yourself. Venus in Gemini through your zone of retreat whispers to listen to what has not yet dared to be said. The Sun in Taurus supports a precious circle of friends carrying you in the background.
cancer.love: Your feeling is fine, almost transparent, and others sense what you are living without you needing to explain everything. If you are partnered, a vulnerability shared softly can bring you closer than a grand gesture. If you are single, you have the chance to redefine what truly moves you, outside of inherited models.
cancer.work: You can place a healthy emotional frame around your week, say no to a meeting that would drain you without feeling guilty. An intuition about a long term project visits you, take it seriously even if you do not use it right away. The right moment sometimes hides inside a patient wait.
cancer.energy: Your body asks for softness, water and warm food, do not push it. A bath or a long shower can be enough to release accumulated tension.
cancer.intuition: The Moon at home in your sign amplifies your perception, especially around loved ones. Tonight's dreams deserve a notebook near the bed.
cancer.mantra: My feeling is a reliable compass
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Sun, your ruler, finishes its run in Taurus through your professional zone, dear Leo, and keeps you focused on your reputation. The waxing Moon enters Cancer through your zone of retreat and calls for a moment of strategic withdrawal. Venus in Gemini still lights up your friendly bonds and your alliances.
lion.love: You have the chance to lower your voice a little to hear the other's. If you are partnered, accepting not to lead the conversation today can deepen closeness in an unexpected way. If you are single, a friend could open an emotional door for you if you accept to be more discreet than usual.
lion.work: A question of visibility or professional positioning is ripening backstage, do not rush the announcement. You can prepare a presentation, a file or a request without yet making it public. A mentor or long time ally can offer a useful perspective if you really listen.
lion.energy: Your heart enjoys a steady rhythm today, avoid excess caffeine. A bit of sun on the skin, even five minutes, recharges you more than a coffee.
lion.intuition: Your solar ego benefits from letting itself be touched by lunar nuance. A soft, silent truth often weighs more than a brilliant declaration.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The waxing Moon in Cancer joins your zone of friendships and collective projects, dear Virgo, and softens your Monday. Mercury, your ruler, keeps you alert to detail without pinching you. The Sun in Taurus, in its final degrees, supports an opening, a trip, a study, an idea wider than usual.
vierge.love: Your heart softens in the presence of friends and chosen people. If you are partnered, a shared outing with others can let the relationship breathe and feed it new air. If you are single, a budding affinity may crystallize in a common circle, observe without trying to control too much.
vierge.work: You have the chance to lean on a network, a professional group or a partnership rather than going it alone. An idea broader than your usual routine deserves to be noted and discussed. A talk with someone from another field can shed light on a file you have been turning over for a while.
vierge.energy: Your gut enjoys simple cooking, lightly spiced and rich in vegetables. A walk after lunch helps your digestion and your mind a great deal.
vierge.intuition: Your clarity grows when you accept to ask for advice without shame. A friend's word may resonate as an answer you already knew.
vierge.mantra: My friendships are a true wealth
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The waxing Moon in Cancer lights up your professional zone, dear Libra, and puts you under a soft but visible light. Venus, your ruler, in Gemini opens your horizons and your wish to move. The Sun in Taurus, in its final degrees, asks you to take a shared financial question seriously.
balance.love: You have the chance to approach a delicate subject with diplomacy, your natural talent works wonders today. If you are partnered, talking about a joint project, trip, purchase or organization, can strengthen the shared momentum. If you are single, an attraction woven around a shared horizon deserves your attention more than a pure spark.
balance.work: A professional opportunity is taking shape backstage, keep an eye open without fidgeting. You can reach out to a key contact or a superior with a clear, calibrated request. Ask a precise question about a budget or shared resources, transparency is your ally.
balance.energy: Your kidneys and lower back ask for a little care, avoid twisted postures held too long. A warm drink after lunch soothes your nervous system.
balance.intuition: Your reading of power dynamics is sharp, observe without reacting right away. What you notice today can serve you for a long time.
balance.mantra: My balance lights up my place
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The waxing Moon enters Cancer through your zone of widening, dear Scorpio, and softens the start of the week. Pluto continues its deep work in the background, but today's dominant note is more tender than dramatic. The Sun in Taurus, in its final degrees, connects you strongly to a key partnership.
scorpion.love: You have the chance to look at a relationship with a softer light than usual. If you are partnered, a question that felt tight can resolve through a conversation less intense than expected. If you are single, someone met in a traveling, studying or philosophical context can spark your curiosity.
scorpion.work: Your strategic intuition stays strong, but today it gains by serving an agreement rather than a fight. You can revive a negotiation, sign a document or clarify a written commitment. A wider horizon, training, publication or work travel, is signaling in the background.
scorpion.energy: Your lower back and hips deserve some attention, stretch them gently. Drink more water than usual to support your liver and your transit.
scorpion.intuition: Your introspective strength teams up today with a call from elsewhere. The meaning of a past event may suddenly appear, welcome the insight without judging it.
scorpion.mantra: I transform with gentleness what is entrusted to me
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The waxing Moon in Cancer touches your zone of deep commitments and shared resources, dear Sagittarius. Jupiter, your ruler, supports you but asks today for more depth than expansion. The Sun in Taurus, in its final degrees, invites you to close a work routine before breathing wider air.
sagittaire.love: An honest conversation about emotional or financial expectations can strengthen trust in a relationship. If you are partnered, daring to speak about what materially binds you to the other takes nothing away from the bond's poetry. If you are single, an attraction denser and deeper than your usual taste for lightness may surprise you.
sagittaire.work: You have the chance to review a contract, a commission, a profit share or an administrative inheritance. A tax or financial question can be clarified through a precise exchange. Avoid signing in a rush, take time to reread the details before the week ends.
sagittaire.energy: Your body asks for careful attention to your pelvis and sacrum, stretch gently. Limit stimulants in the evening to favor deep sleep.
sagittaire.intuition: What returns in dreams or recurring thoughts carries real information today. Your intuition gains by diving below the surface rather than leaping toward the horizon.
sagittaire.mantra: I welcome depth as a strength
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The waxing Moon in Cancer lights up your zone of committed relationships, dear Capricorn, and softens how you read others. Saturn, your ruler, continues its patient work but leaves you today more heart space than usual. The Sun in Taurus, in its final degrees, supports a creative or romantic momentum worth honoring.
capricorne.love: You can make yourself available to what the other is living without needing to fix or plan everything. If you are partnered, listening without immediate solution can create a precious climate of peace. If you are single, a person with a serious, structuring profile may enter your field and touch you more than you imagined.
capricorne.work: You have the chance to move an important collaboration forward, sign an agreement or clarify a role in a professional duo. Avoid working in pure solitude today, your effectiveness flows through exchange. A reply from a partner or client can give you precious information about your positioning.
capricorne.energy: Your skeleton and joints thank you if you take a few minutes to move gently. Stay warm, take care of your feet and knees.
capricorne.intuition: Your reading of others is especially accurate, trust it. Someone offering you a hand today deserves to be taken seriously.
capricorne.mantra: I build my bonds with time
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The waxing Moon in Cancer puts the focus on your daily life, your work and your routines, dear Aquarius. Uranus, your modern ruler, continues its passage in a zone that asks for boldness, but today's invitation is more about regularity. The Sun in Taurus, in its final degrees, supports a matter of home or family.
verseau.love: You have the chance to make tangible what you feel, through a useful gesture rather than a grand declaration. If you are partnered, sharing a daily task can create a new, almost ritual intimacy. If you are single, an encounter in a routine context, sport, work, your usual cafe, can surprise you.
verseau.work: A healthier organization of your days begins today with one small concrete decision. You can clarify a protocol, a tool, a habit that was costing you without you fully realizing. Avoid scattering, choose one single simplification project and hold it across the week.
verseau.energy: Your calves, ankles and venous circulation enjoy a quiet walk. Hydrate regularly even without feeling thirsty.
verseau.intuition: Your body speaks to you today through the simplest sensations, listen to its ordinary signals. Genius sometimes hides in the most everyday gesture.
verseau.mantra: I tend to my days with love
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The waxing Moon in Cancer bathes your creative, romantic and playful zone, dear Pisces, and amplifies your imagination. Neptune, your ruler, continues its passage in an energy that asks for both dream and discernment. The Sun in Taurus, in its final degrees, supports a writing, message or tender contact project.
poissons.love: Your charm is especially soft and enveloping today. If you are partnered, a poetic gesture, a sensory attention, can revive a slightly sleepy flame. If you are single, an attraction growing through messages, shared readings or conversations on sensitive topics can take shape.
poissons.work: You have the chance to express a creative idea with more precision than usual. An artistic, educational or child centered project can move forward if you set one concrete step. Put your ideas in writing, the passage from imagination to form is your stake today.
poissons.energy: Your heart and solar plexus enjoy the warmth of a hot drink and a full breath. Avoid quick sugars that stir your emotional field.
poissons.intuition: Your dreams and inner images carry a message that goes beyond the mind. A poem, a drawing, a scribbled note can capture what words alone do not catch.
poissons.mantra: My sensitivity is a source of creation
poissons.author: Sibylle
